View Rust Code (7493 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read, Write, BufReader, BufWriter, BufRead, Seek, SeekFrom};
use std::fs::OpenOptions;

fn main() {
    let stdin = io::stdin();
    let stdout = io::stdout();
    let mut reader = BufReader::with_capacity(1 << 20, stdin.lock());
    let mut writer = BufWriter::with_capacity(1 << 20, stdout.lock());

    let mut header = String::new();
    reader.read_line(&mut header).expect("read header");
    let parts: Vec<usize> = header.trim().split_whitespace()
        .map(|s| s.parse().expect("parse"))
        .collect();
    let num_points = parts[0];
    let num_clusters = parts[1];

    if num_clusters == 0 || num_points == 0 {
        return;
    }

    let k = num_clusters.min(num_points);

    if num_points <= 10_000_000 {
        run_inmemory(&mut reader, &mut writer, num_points, k);
    } else {
        run_streaming(&mut reader, &mut writer, num_points, k);
    }

    writer.flush().unwrap();
}

struct Rng { s: u64 }
impl Rng {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self { Self { s: seed ^ 0x6a09e667f3bcc908 } }
    fn next(&mut self) -> u64 {
        self.s ^= self.s << 13; self.s ^= self.s >> 7; self.s ^= self.s << 17; self.s
    }
    fn usize(&mut self) -> usize { self.next() as usize }
    fn f64(&mut self) -> f64 { (self.next() >> 11) as f64 / (1u64 << 53) as f64 }
}

fn read_batch(reader: &mut impl Read, count: usize) -> Vec<[f32; 3]> {
    let mut buf = vec![0u8; count * 12];
    reader.read_exact(&mut buf).expect("read points");
    let mut pts = Vec::with_capacity(count);
    for i in 0..count {
        let o = i * 12;
        pts.push([
            f32::from_le_bytes([buf[o], buf[o+1], buf[o+2], buf[o+3]]),
            f32::from_le_bytes([buf[o+4], buf[o+5], buf[o+6], buf[o+7]]),
            f32::from_le_bytes([buf[o+8], buf[o+9], buf[o+10], buf[o+11]]),
        ]);
    }
    pts
}

fn write_assigns(writer: &mut impl Write, a: &[u32]) {
    let mut buf = vec![0u8; a.len() * 4];
    for (i, &v) in a.iter().enumerate() {
        let b = v.to_le_bytes();
        let o = i * 4;
        buf[o]=b[0]; buf[o+1]=b[1]; buf[o+2]=b[2]; buf[o+3]=b[3];
    }
    writer.write_all(&buf).unwrap();
}

#[inline(always)]
fn dsq(a: &[f64;3], b: &[f64;3]) -> f64 {
    let dx=a[0]-b[0]; let dy=a[1]-b[1]; let dz=a[2]-b[2];
    dx*dx+dy*dy+dz*dz
}

fn nearest(p: &[f64;3], c: &[[f64;3]]) -> u32 {
    let mut bi = 0u32;
    let mut bd = f64::MAX;
    for (i, ci) in c.iter().enumerate() {
        let d = dsq(p, ci);
        if d < bd { bd=d; bi=i as u32; }
    }
    bi
}

fn pf(p: &[f32;3]) -> [f64;3] { [p[0] as f64, p[1] as f64, p[2] as f64] }

fn kpp(points: &[[f32;3]], k: usize) -> Vec<[f64;3]> {
    let n = points.len();
    let mut rng = Rng::new(42);
    let mut cs: Vec<[f64;3]> = Vec::with_capacity(k);
    cs.push(pf(&points[rng.usize() % n]));
    if k == 1 { return cs; }

    let mut dists = vec![f64::MAX; n];
    for _ in 1..k {
        let last = cs.last().unwrap();
        let mut total = 0.0f64;
        for i in 0..n {
            let d = dsq(&pf(&points[i]), last);
            if d < dists[i] { dists[i] = d; }
            total += dists[i];
        }
        if total == 0.0 { cs.push(*last); continue; }
        let t = rng.f64() * total;
        let mut cum = 0.0;
        let mut ch = n-1;
        for i in 0..n {
            cum += dists[i];
            if cum >= t { ch=i; break; }
        }
        cs.push(pf(&points[ch]));
    }
    cs
}

fn fix_empty(cs: &mut [[f64;3]], counts: &[u64]) {
    for j in 0..cs.len() {
        if counts[j] == 0 {
            if let Some((lg, _)) = counts.iter().enumerate().max_by_key(|(_,&c)| c) {
                cs[j][0] = cs[lg][0] + 0.001;
                cs[j][1] = cs[lg][1] + 0.001;
                cs[j][2] = cs[lg][2] - 0.001;
            }
        }
    }
}

fn run_inmemory(reader: &mut impl Read, writer: &mut impl Write, n: usize, k: usize) {
    let points = read_batch(reader, n);
    let mut centroids = kpp(&points, k);
    let mut assigns = vec![0u32; n];

    for _ in 0..25 {
        let mut changed = 0usize;
        for i in 0..n {
            let c = nearest(&pf(&points[i]), &centroids);
            if assigns[i] != c { changed+=1; assigns[i]=c; }
        }

        let mut sums = vec![[0.0f64;3]; k];
        let mut counts = vec![0u64; k];
        for i in 0..n {
            let ci = assigns[i] as usize;
            sums[ci][0] += points[i][0] as f64;
            sums[ci][1] += points[i][1] as f64;
            sums[ci][2] += points[i][2] as f64;
            counts[ci] += 1;
        }
        for j in 0..k {
            if counts[j] > 0 {
                centroids[j] = [sums[j][0]/counts[j] as f64, sums[j][1]/counts[j] as f64, sums[j][2]/counts[j] as f64];
            }
        }
        fix_empty(&mut centroids, &counts);
        if changed == 0 || (changed as f64 / n as f64) < 0.001 { break; }
    }
    write_assigns(writer, &assigns);
}

fn run_streaming(reader: &mut impl Read, writer: &mut impl Write, n: usize, k: usize) {
    let tmp_path = make_tmp_path();
    {
        let tmp = OpenOptions::new().write(true).create(true).truncate(true)
            .open(&tmp_path).expect("create tmp");
        let mut tmp = BufWriter::with_capacity(1 << 20, tmp);
        let bs = 1_000_000usize;
        let mut rem = n;
        while rem > 0 {
            let batch = bs.min(rem);
            let mut buf = vec![0u8; batch * 12];
            reader.read_exact(&mut buf).expect("read");
            tmp.write_all(&buf).unwrap();
            rem -= batch;
        }
        tmp.flush().unwrap();
    }

    let mut tmp = BufReader::with_capacity(1 << 20,
        OpenOptions::new().read(true).open(&tmp_path).expect("open tmp"));

    // Sample for init
    let sample_n = (k * 50).min(n).min(2_000_000);
    let sample = read_batch(&mut tmp, sample_n);
    let mut centroids = kpp(&sample, k);

    // K-means passes
    let passes = if n > 500_000_000 { 2 } else if n > 100_000_000 { 3 } else { 5 };
    let bs = 1_000_000usize;

    for _ in 0..passes {
        tmp.seek(SeekFrom::Start(0)).unwrap();
        let mut sums = vec![[0.0f64;3]; k];
        let mut counts = vec![0u64; k];
        let mut rem = n;
        while rem > 0 {
            let batch = bs.min(rem);
            let pts = read_batch(&mut tmp, batch);
            rem -= batch;
            for p in &pts {
                let ci = nearest(&pf(p), &centroids) as usize;
                sums[ci][0] += p[0] as f64;
                sums[ci][1] += p[1] as f64;
                sums[ci][2] += p[2] as f64;
                counts[ci] += 1;
            }
        }
        for j in 0..k {
            if counts[j] > 0 {
                centroids[j] = [sums[j][0]/counts[j] as f64, sums[j][1]/counts[j] as f64, sums[j][2]/counts[j] as f64];
            }
        }
        fix_empty(&mut centroids, &counts);
    }

    // Final assignment pass
    tmp.seek(SeekFrom::Start(0)).unwrap();
    let mut rem = n;
    while rem > 0 {
        let batch = bs.min(rem);
        let pts = read_batch(&mut tmp, batch);
        rem -= batch;
        let a: Vec<u32> = pts.iter().map(|p| nearest(&pf(p), &centroids)).collect();
        write_assigns(writer, &a);
    }

    drop(tmp);
    let _ = std::fs::remove_file(&tmp_path);
}

fn make_tmp_path() -> String {
    let pid = std::process::id();
    if cfg!(windows) {
        let dir = std::env::var("TEMP").unwrap_or_else(|_| ".".into());
        format!("{}\\kmeans_{}.tmp", dir, pid)
    } else {
        format!("/tmp/kmeans_{}.tmp", pid)
    }
}

Test 27: Graph Coloring (C++) Score: 1.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve the Graph Coloring problem.

**The Challenge:**
Your C++ graph colorer will be tested with graphs ranging from simple 50 nodes
to massive million-node graphs requiring 60 colours.

**Problem:**
Color a graph with exactly k colours such that no two adjacent vertices share the same colour.
This is NP-Complete and requires sophisticated algorithms for larger instances.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges num_colors
u v (for each edge, 0-indexed)
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
color_0 color_1 ... color_(n-1) (color assignment for each vertex)
```

**Success Criteria:**
- All vertices assigned valid colors (0 to k-1)
- No adjacent vertices share the same color
- All vertices are colored (complete coloring)

**Failure Criteria:**
- Cannot find valid coloring within time limit
- Invalid color assignment (adjacent vertices same color)
- Incomplete coloring

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35728 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with g++ or MSVC (C++17)
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable graph sizes and color counts
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying graph complexities efficiently

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on graph complexity.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Colour the nodes of a graph using as few colours as possible, with the rule that no two connected nodes may share the same colour. This is the same idea as colouring a map so that no neighbouring countries are the same colour.

Finding the minimum number of colours is NP-hard. Subpasses increase the graph size and connectivity. The AI’s colouring must be valid (no clashes) and use as few colours as possible.

 1.0000
[20 vertices, 4 colors] Valid coloring in 0.10s

Graph Coloring - 20 vertices, 4 colors

View C++ Code (7823 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>
#include <random>
#include <chrono>
#include <set>
#include <tuple>
#include <climits>
#include <cstdio>

using namespace std;
using ll = long long;

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(nullptr);

    int n, m, k;
    cin >> n >> m >> k;

    vector<vector<int>> adj(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        int u, v;
        cin >> u >> v;
        adj[u].push_back(v);
        adj[v].push_back(u);
    }

    vector<int> color(n, -1);
    auto start = chrono::steady_clock::now();
    auto elapsed_ms = [&]() -> ll {
        return chrono::duration_cast<chrono::milliseconds>(
            chrono::steady_clock::now() - start).count();
    };

    auto output = [&]() {
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (i) putchar(' ');
            printf("%d", color[i]);
        }
        putchar('\n');
    };

    auto greedy = [&](const vector<int>& order) -> bool {
        fill(color.begin(), color.end(), -1);
        vector<bool> used(k, false);
        for (int v : order) {
            fill(used.begin(), used.end(), false);
            for (int u : adj[v]) {
                if (color[u] >= 0) used[color[u]] = true;
            }
            color[v] = -1;
            for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) {
                if (!used[i]) { color[v] = i; break; }
            }
            if (color[v] == -1) return false;
        }
        return true;
    };

    // 1. Greedy with largest-degree-first ordering
    vector<int> order(n);
    iota(order.begin(), order.end(), 0);
    sort(order.begin(), order.end(), [&](int a, int b) {
        return adj[a].size() > adj[b].size();
    });

    if (greedy(order)) { output(); return 0; }

    ll nk = (ll)n * k;

    // 2. DSatur with priority queue
    if (nk <= 60000000LL) {
        fill(color.begin(), color.end(), -1);
        vector<int> cc(nk, 0);
        vector<int> sat(n, 0);
        vector<int> deg(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) deg[i] = (int)adj[i].size();

        set<tuple<int,int,int>> pq;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            pq.insert({0, -deg[i], i});
        }

        bool ok = true;
        for (int step = 0; step < n && ok; step++) {
            auto it = pq.begin();
            auto [ns, nd, v] = *it;
            pq.erase(it);

            vector<bool> used(k, false);
            for (int u : adj[v]) {
                if (color[u] >= 0) used[color[u]] = true;
            }
            int c = -1;
            for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) {
                if (!used[i]) { c = i; break; }
            }
            if (c == -1) { ok = false; break; }

            color[v] = c;
            for (int u : adj[v]) {
                if (color[u] == -1) {
                    ll idx = (ll)u * k + c;
                    if (cc[idx] == 0) {
                        pq.erase({-sat[u], -deg[u], u});
                        sat[u]++;
                        pq.insert({-sat[u], -deg[u], u});
                    }
                    cc[idx]++;
                }
            }
        }

        if (ok) { output(); return 0; }
        cc.clear();
        cc.shrink_to_fit();
    }

    // 3. TabuCol local search
    if (nk <= 40000000LL) {
        mt19937 rng(42);
        int best_total = INT_MAX;
        vector<int> best_color(n);

        for (int restart = 0; restart < 100 && elapsed_ms() < 270000; restart++) {
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) color[i] = rng() % k;

            vector<int> cc(nk, 0);
            for (int v = 0; v < n; v++) {
                for (int u : adj[v]) {
                    cc[(ll)v * k + color[u]]++;
                }
            }

            int total = 0;
            vector<int> conf;
            for (int v = 0; v < n; v++) {
                int c = cc[(ll)v * k + color[v]];
                total += c;
                if (c > 0) conf.push_back(v);
            }
            total /= 2;

            if (total == 0) { output(); return 0; }

            vector<int> tabu(nk, 0);
            int tenure_base = k + 5;
            int no_improve = 0;
            int prev_total = total;

            for (int iter = 1; total > 0 && elapsed_ms() < 270000; iter++) {
                if (conf.empty()) break;

                if (iter % 10000 == 0) {
                    if (total >= prev_total) no_improve += 10000;
                    else no_improve = 0;
                    prev_total = total;
                    if (no_improve > 500000) break;
                }

                if (iter % 50000 == 0) {
                    conf.clear();
                    for (int v = 0; v < n; v++) {
                        if (cc[(ll)v * k + color[v]] > 0) conf.push_back(v);
                    }
                    if (conf.empty()) break;
                }

                int idx = rng() % (int)conf.size();
                int v = conf[idx];
                ll vk = (ll)v * k;

                if (cc[vk + color[v]] == 0) {
                    conf[idx] = conf.back();
                    conf.pop_back();
                    continue;
                }

                int old_c = color[v];
                int best_c = -1;
                int best_delta = INT_MAX;

                for (int c = 0; c < k; c++) {
                    if (c == old_c) continue;
                    int delta = cc[vk + c] - cc[vk + old_c];
                    if (delta < best_delta) {
                        if (tabu[vk + c] <= iter || total + delta == 0) {
                            best_delta = delta;
                            best_c = c;
                        }
                    }
                }

                if (best_c == -1) continue;

                color[v] = best_c;
                total += best_delta;
                tabu[vk + old_c] = iter + tenure_base + (int)(rng() % 10);

                for (int u : adj[v]) {
                    ll uk = (ll)u * k;
                    bool was_conf = (cc[uk + color[u]] > 0);
                    cc[uk + old_c]--;
                    cc[uk + best_c]++;
                    bool is_conf = (cc[uk + color[u]] > 0);
                    if (!was_conf && is_conf) conf.push_back(u);
                }

                if (cc[vk + best_c] == 0) {
                    conf[idx] = conf.back();
                    conf.pop_back();
                }

                if (total < best_total) {
                    best_total = total;
                    best_color = color;
                }
            }

            if (total == 0) { output(); return 0; }
        }

        if (best_total < INT_MAX) {
            color = best_color;
        }
    }

    // 4. Smallest-last ordering
    if (n <= 500000) {
        vector<int> deg(n);
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) deg[i] = (int)adj[i].size();
        vector<bool> removed(n, false);
        vector<int> sl_order;
        sl_order.reserve(n);

        for (int step = 0; step < n; step++) {
            int best = -1;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                if (!removed[i] && (best == -1 || deg[i] < deg[best])) {
                    best = i;
                }
            }
            sl_order.push_back(best);
            removed[best] = true;
            for (int u : adj[best]) {
                if (!removed[u]) deg[u]--;
            }
        }
        reverse(sl_order.begin(), sl_order.end());
        if (greedy(sl_order)) { output(); return 0; }
    }

    // 5. Random shuffle retries
    {
        mt19937 rng(12345);
        while (elapsed_ms() < 280000) {
            shuffle(order.begin(), order.end(), rng);
            if (greedy(order)) { output(); return 0; }
        }
    }

    // 6. Fallback
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        if (color[i] < 0 || color[i] >= k) color[i] = 0;
    }
    output();
    return 0;
}

Test 28: Minimum Vertex Cover (Rust) Score: 8.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the Minimum Vertex Cover problem.

Your code may see graphs with up to 2M vertices and 15M edges.

**Problem:**
Find the minimum set of vertices such that every edge has at least one endpoint in the set.
This is NP-Hard and requires sophisticated algorithms for larger instances.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges
u v (for each edge, 0-indexed)
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
vertex_count
vertex_1 vertex_2 ... vertex_k (vertices in the cover, space-separated)
```

**Success Criteria:**
- All edges are covered by selected vertices
- Vertex set size is minimized (or near-minimized for large graphs)
- Output format is correct

**Failure Criteria:**
- Not all edges are covered
- Timeout without solution
- Invalid output format

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Be aware that default warnings are enabled and will cause a compilation failure,
so ensure that you write warning-free code.

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.

 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Find the smallest set of nodes in a graph such that every edge has at least one endpoint in the set. Imagine placing guards at intersections so that every road is watched by at least one guard — use as few guards as possible.

This is a classic NP-hard problem. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal answer, so grading is strict pass/fail. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[10 vertices, 30 edges] Cover size 7 (optimal: 7), 0.10s

Minimum Vertex Cover - 10 vertices, 30 edges

View Rust Code (3925 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read, Write, BufWriter};
use std::collections::BinaryHeap;

fn add_to_cover(
    v: usize,
    adj: &[Vec<u32>],
    in_cover: &mut [bool],
    active: &mut [bool],
    deg: &mut [u32],
    queue: &mut Vec<u32>,
) {
    if !active[v] {
        return;
    }
    in_cover[v] = true;
    active[v] = false;
    for &u in &adj[v] {
        let u = u as usize;
        if active[u] {
            deg[u] -= 1;
            if deg[u] <= 1 {
                queue.push(u as u32);
            }
        }
    }
}

fn process_low_degree(
    adj: &[Vec<u32>],
    in_cover: &mut [bool],
    active: &mut [bool],
    deg: &mut [u32],
    queue: &mut Vec<u32>,
) {
    while let Some(vi) = queue.pop() {
        let v = vi as usize;
        if !active[v] {
            continue;
        }
        if deg[v] == 0 {
            active[v] = false;
            continue;
        }
        if deg[v] == 1 {
            if let Some(&u) = adj[v].iter().find(|&&u| active[u as usize]) {
                add_to_cover(u as usize, adj, in_cover, active, deg, queue);
            }
            if active[v] && deg[v] == 0 {
                active[v] = false;
            }
        }
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut raw = Vec::new();
    io::stdin().lock().read_to_end(&mut raw).unwrap();
    let stdout = io::stdout();
    let mut out = BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());

    let mut pos = 0;
    let input = &raw;

    let next_usize = |pos: &mut usize| -> usize {
        while *pos < input.len()
            && (input[*pos] == b' ' || input[*pos] == b'\n' || input[*pos] == b'\r')
        {
            *pos += 1;
        }
        let mut val = 0usize;
        while *pos < input.len() && input[*pos] >= b'0' && input[*pos] <= b'9' {
            val = val * 10 + (input[*pos] - b'0') as usize;
            *pos += 1;
        }
        val
    };

    let n = next_usize(&mut pos);
    let m = next_usize(&mut pos);

    let mut adj: Vec<Vec<u32>> = vec![vec![]; n];
    for _ in 0..m {
        let u = next_usize(&mut pos);
        let v = next_usize(&mut pos);
        adj[u].push(v as u32);
        adj[v].push(u as u32);
    }

    let mut in_cover = vec![false; n];
    let mut active = vec![true; n];
    let mut deg: Vec<u32> = (0..n).map(|i| adj[i].len() as u32).collect();
    let mut queue: Vec<u32> = Vec::new();

    for i in 0..n {
        if deg[i] <= 1 {
            queue.push(i as u32);
        }
    }
    process_low_degree(&adj, &mut in_cover, &mut active, &mut deg, &mut queue);

    let mut heap: BinaryHeap<(u32, u32)> = BinaryHeap::new();
    for i in 0..n {
        if active[i] && deg[i] > 0 {
            heap.push((deg[i], i as u32));
        }
    }

    while let Some((d, vi)) = heap.pop() {
        let v = vi as usize;
        if !active[v] || deg[v] != d {
            continue;
        }

        in_cover[v] = true;
        active[v] = false;
        for &u in &adj[v] {
            let u = u as usize;
            if active[u] {
                deg[u] -= 1;
                if deg[u] <= 1 {
                    queue.push(u as u32);
                } else {
                    heap.push((deg[u], u as u32));
                }
            }
        }

        process_low_degree(&adj, &mut in_cover, &mut active, &mut deg, &mut queue);
    }

    let mut cover_sorted: Vec<usize> = (0..n).filter(|&i| in_cover[i]).collect();
    cover_sorted.sort_by_key(|&v| adj[v].len());
    for v in cover_sorted {
        if in_cover[v] && adj[v].iter().all(|&u| in_cover[u as usize]) {
            in_cover[v] = false;
        }
    }

    let result: Vec<usize> = (0..n).filter(|&i| in_cover[i]).collect();
    writeln!(out, "{}", result.len()).unwrap();
    let mut buf = String::with_capacity(result.len() * 4);
    for (i, &v) in result.iter().enumerate() {
        if i > 0 {
            buf.push(' ');
        }
        buf.push_str(&v.to_string());
    }
    writeln!(out, "{}", buf).unwrap();
}

Subpass 4
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Test 29: Maximum Clique (C#) Score: 18.00 / 18
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to solve the Maximum Clique problem, which is NP Hard.

Your C# maximum clique finder will be tested with graphs ranging from sparse to very dense instances.
The same algorithm must work efficiently across ALL graph complexities, from 20 vertices to 1 million.

**Problem:**
Find the largest complete subgraph (clique) in an undirected graph.
A clique is a set of vertices where every pair of vertices is connected by an edge.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges
u v (for each edge, 0-indexed)
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
clique_size
vertex_1 vertex_2 ... vertex_k (vertices in the maximum clique, space-separated)
```

**Success Criteria:**
- All vertices in output form a complete subgraph
- No larger clique exists in the graph
- Output format is correct

**Failure Criteria:**
- Output vertices don't form a clique
- Larger clique exists
- Timeout without solution
- Invalid output format

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable graph sizes and densities
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying graph complexities efficiently

Hints:
- You may wish to drop to a hueristic if time is running out for partial score.
- Use threads to process in parallel.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: Intel64 Family 6 Model 158 Stepping 10, GenuineIntel
Core count: 12
Memory: 31.93 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (.NET SDK 10.0.201; SDKs 10.0.201) | csc 5.3.0-2.26153.122 (4d3023de605a78ba3e59e50c657eed70f125c68a) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Find the largest group of nodes in a graph where every pair is directly connected. Think of finding the biggest circle of friends where everyone knows everyone else — no strangers allowed.

This is one of the hardest problems in computer science (NP-hard). The test uses planted instances with a known answer for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the graph size and density.

 1.0000
[20 vertices, dense] Answered Clique size 18 (true: 18), 0.09s

Maximum Clique - 20 vertices, dense

View C# Code (9213 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

class Program
{
    static int N, M;
    static int[][] Adj;
    static Stopwatch SW;
    static volatile int GBest;
    static int[] GBestClique;
    static readonly object Lk = new object();
    static volatile bool Stop;
    const long TL = 270_000;
    static byte[] buf;
    static int bp;

    static void Main()
    {
        SW = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        ReadInput();
        if (N == 0) { Console.Write("0\n\n"); return; }
        if (M == 0) { Console.Write("1\n0\n"); return; }

        int[] order = new int[N], pos = new int[N];
        Degeneracy(order, pos);

        GBestClique = Greedy(order);
        GBest = GBestClique.Length;

        int cores = Math.Max(1, Environment.ProcessorCount);
        Parallel.For(0, N, new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = cores }, (rawIdx) =>
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int i = N - 1 - rawIdx;
            if (i < 0) return;
            int v = order[i];

            var av = Adj[v];
            int rc = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rc++;
            if (rc + 1 <= GBest) return;

            int[] rn = new int[rc];
            int ri = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rn[ri++] = av[k];

            int sn = rn.Length;
            var vm = new Dictionary<int, int>(sn * 2);
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) vm[rn[j]] = j;

            int words = (sn + 63) >> 6;
            var la = new ulong[sn][];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) la[j] = new ulong[words];

            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++)
            {
                int u = rn[j];
                var au = Adj[u];
                for (int k = 0; k < au.Length; k++)
                {
                    if (vm.TryGetValue(au[k], out int wi) && wi > j)
                    {
                        la[j][wi >> 6] |= 1UL << (wi & 63);
                        la[wi][j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);
                    }
                }
            }

            ulong[] P = new ulong[words];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) P[j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);

            int[] cl = new int[sn];
            int[] lb = null;
            int lbl = GBest - 1;
            int nc = 0;

            Search(la, P, sn, cl, 0, ref lb, ref lbl, words, ref nc);

            if (lb != null)
            {
                var full = new int[lb.Length + 1];
                full[0] = v;
                for (int j = 0; j < lb.Length; j++) full[j + 1] = rn[lb[j]];
                lock (Lk)
                {
                    if (full.Length > GBest)
                    {
                        GBestClique = full;
                        GBest = full.Length;
                    }
                }
            }
        });

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.Append(GBest).Append('\n');
        for (int i = 0; i < GBestClique.Length; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) sb.Append(' ');
            sb.Append(GBestClique[i]);
        }
        sb.Append('\n');
        Console.Write(sb.ToString());
    }

    static void Search(ulong[][] la, ulong[] P, int pl, int[] cl, int cLen,
        ref int[] best, ref int bl, int w, ref int nc)
    {
        if (Stop) return;
        if (++nc % 8192 == 0)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > TL) { Stop = true; return; }
            int gb = GBest;
            if (gb - 1 > bl) bl = gb - 1;
        }

        if (cLen + pl <= bl) return;

        if (pl == 0)
        {
            if (cLen > bl)
            {
                bl = cLen;
                best = new int[cLen];
                Array.Copy(cl, best, cLen);
            }
            return;
        }

        int[] vs = new int[pl];
        int vi = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < w && vi < pl; i++)
        {
            ulong b = P[i];
            while (b != 0)
            {
                int bit = BitOperations.TrailingZeroCount(b);
                vs[vi++] = (i << 6) | bit;
                b &= b - 1;
            }
        }

        int[] col = new int[pl];
        int mc = 0;
        int[] used = new int[pl + 2];
        int marker = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < pl; i++)
        {
            marker++;
            int v = vs[i];
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++)
            {
                int u = vs[j];
                if ((la[v][u >> 6] & (1UL << (u & 63))) != 0)
                    used[col[j]] = marker;
            }
            int c = 1;
            while (used[c] == marker) c++;
            col[i] = c;
            if (c > mc) mc = c;
        }

        if (cLen + mc <= bl) return;

        Array.Sort(col, vs, 0, pl);

        ulong[] cp = new ulong[w];
        Array.Copy(P, cp, w);

        for (int ii = pl - 1; ii >= 0; ii--)
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int v = vs[ii];
            int c = col[ii];
            if (cLen + c <= bl) return;

            ulong[] np = new ulong[w];
            int npl = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < w; i++)
            {
                np[i] = cp[i] & la[v][i];
                npl += BitOperations.PopCount(np[i]);
            }

            cl[cLen] = v;
            Search(la, np, npl, cl, cLen + 1, ref best, ref bl, w, ref nc);

            cp[v >> 6] &= ~(1UL << (v & 63));
        }
    }

    static void ReadInput()
    {
        using var ms = new MemoryStream();
        using var si = Console.OpenStandardInput();
        si.CopyTo(ms);
        buf = ms.ToArray();
        bp = 0;
        N = RI(); M = RI();
        var al = new List<int>[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) al[i] = new List<int>();
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
        {
            int u = RI(), v = RI();
            al[u].Add(v); al[v].Add(u);
        }
        Adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++)
        {
            al[i].Sort();
            Adj[i] = al[i].ToArray();
        }
    }

    static int RI()
    {
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] <= (byte)' ') bp++;
        int r = 0;
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] >= (byte)'0' && buf[bp] <= (byte)'9')
            r = r * 10 + (buf[bp++] - '0');
        return r;
    }

    static void Degeneracy(int[] order, int[] pos)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int md = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) if (deg[i] > md) md = deg[i];

        int[] hd = new int[md + 2];
        int[] nx = new int[N], pv = new int[N];
        Array.Fill(hd, -1);
        for (int i = N - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            nx[i] = hd[deg[i]];
            pv[i] = -1;
            if (hd[deg[i]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[i]]] = i;
            hd[deg[i]] = i;
        }

        bool[] rm = new bool[N];
        int cur = 0;
        for (int it = 0; it < N; it++)
        {
            while (cur <= md && hd[cur] == -1) cur++;
            int v = hd[cur];
            hd[cur] = nx[v];
            if (nx[v] != -1) pv[nx[v]] = -1;
            rm[v] = true;
            order[it] = v;
            pos[v] = it;

            var av = Adj[v];
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
            {
                int u = av[k];
                if (rm[u]) continue;
                int od = deg[u];
                if (pv[u] == -1)
                {
                    hd[od] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = -1;
                }
                else
                {
                    nx[pv[u]] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = pv[u];
                }
                deg[u]--;
                nx[u] = hd[deg[u]];
                pv[u] = -1;
                if (hd[deg[u]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[u]]] = u;
                hd[deg[u]] = u;
                if (deg[u] < cur) cur = deg[u];
            }
        }
    }

    static int[] Greedy(int[] dOrder)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int[] byDeg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) byDeg[i] = i;
        Array.Sort(byDeg, (a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));

        int[] best = { byDeg[0] };
        var starts = new HashSet<int>();
        int tries = Math.Min(N, 100);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries; t++) starts.Add(byDeg[t]);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries && N - 1 - t >= 0; t++) starts.Add(dOrder[N - 1 - t]);

        foreach (int start in starts)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > 5000) break;
            var clique = new List<int> { start };
            var cands = new List<int>(Adj[start]);
            cands.Sort((a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));
            foreach (int v in cands)
            {
                bool ok = true;
                foreach (int u in clique)
                    if (Array.BinarySearch(Adj[v], u) < 0) { ok = false; break; }
                if (ok) clique.Add(v);
            }
            if (clique.Count > best.Length) best = clique.ToArray();
        }
        return best;
    }
}

Green nodes are correctly selected clique vertices. Red nodes are missed clique vertices. Amber nodes are incorrect extras.

View C# Code (9213 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

class Program
{
    static int N, M;
    static int[][] Adj;
    static Stopwatch SW;
    static volatile int GBest;
    static int[] GBestClique;
    static readonly object Lk = new object();
    static volatile bool Stop;
    const long TL = 270_000;
    static byte[] buf;
    static int bp;

    static void Main()
    {
        SW = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        ReadInput();
        if (N == 0) { Console.Write("0\n\n"); return; }
        if (M == 0) { Console.Write("1\n0\n"); return; }

        int[] order = new int[N], pos = new int[N];
        Degeneracy(order, pos);

        GBestClique = Greedy(order);
        GBest = GBestClique.Length;

        int cores = Math.Max(1, Environment.ProcessorCount);
        Parallel.For(0, N, new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = cores }, (rawIdx) =>
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int i = N - 1 - rawIdx;
            if (i < 0) return;
            int v = order[i];

            var av = Adj[v];
            int rc = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rc++;
            if (rc + 1 <= GBest) return;

            int[] rn = new int[rc];
            int ri = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rn[ri++] = av[k];

            int sn = rn.Length;
            var vm = new Dictionary<int, int>(sn * 2);
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) vm[rn[j]] = j;

            int words = (sn + 63) >> 6;
            var la = new ulong[sn][];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) la[j] = new ulong[words];

            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++)
            {
                int u = rn[j];
                var au = Adj[u];
                for (int k = 0; k < au.Length; k++)
                {
                    if (vm.TryGetValue(au[k], out int wi) && wi > j)
                    {
                        la[j][wi >> 6] |= 1UL << (wi & 63);
                        la[wi][j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);
                    }
                }
            }

            ulong[] P = new ulong[words];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) P[j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);

            int[] cl = new int[sn];
            int[] lb = null;
            int lbl = GBest - 1;
            int nc = 0;

            Search(la, P, sn, cl, 0, ref lb, ref lbl, words, ref nc);

            if (lb != null)
            {
                var full = new int[lb.Length + 1];
                full[0] = v;
                for (int j = 0; j < lb.Length; j++) full[j + 1] = rn[lb[j]];
                lock (Lk)
                {
                    if (full.Length > GBest)
                    {
                        GBestClique = full;
                        GBest = full.Length;
                    }
                }
            }
        });

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.Append(GBest).Append('\n');
        for (int i = 0; i < GBestClique.Length; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) sb.Append(' ');
            sb.Append(GBestClique[i]);
        }
        sb.Append('\n');
        Console.Write(sb.ToString());
    }

    static void Search(ulong[][] la, ulong[] P, int pl, int[] cl, int cLen,
        ref int[] best, ref int bl, int w, ref int nc)
    {
        if (Stop) return;
        if (++nc % 8192 == 0)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > TL) { Stop = true; return; }
            int gb = GBest;
            if (gb - 1 > bl) bl = gb - 1;
        }

        if (cLen + pl <= bl) return;

        if (pl == 0)
        {
            if (cLen > bl)
            {
                bl = cLen;
                best = new int[cLen];
                Array.Copy(cl, best, cLen);
            }
            return;
        }

        int[] vs = new int[pl];
        int vi = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < w && vi < pl; i++)
        {
            ulong b = P[i];
            while (b != 0)
            {
                int bit = BitOperations.TrailingZeroCount(b);
                vs[vi++] = (i << 6) | bit;
                b &= b - 1;
            }
        }

        int[] col = new int[pl];
        int mc = 0;
        int[] used = new int[pl + 2];
        int marker = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < pl; i++)
        {
            marker++;
            int v = vs[i];
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++)
            {
                int u = vs[j];
                if ((la[v][u >> 6] & (1UL << (u & 63))) != 0)
                    used[col[j]] = marker;
            }
            int c = 1;
            while (used[c] == marker) c++;
            col[i] = c;
            if (c > mc) mc = c;
        }

        if (cLen + mc <= bl) return;

        Array.Sort(col, vs, 0, pl);

        ulong[] cp = new ulong[w];
        Array.Copy(P, cp, w);

        for (int ii = pl - 1; ii >= 0; ii--)
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int v = vs[ii];
            int c = col[ii];
            if (cLen + c <= bl) return;

            ulong[] np = new ulong[w];
            int npl = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < w; i++)
            {
                np[i] = cp[i] & la[v][i];
                npl += BitOperations.PopCount(np[i]);
            }

            cl[cLen] = v;
            Search(la, np, npl, cl, cLen + 1, ref best, ref bl, w, ref nc);

            cp[v >> 6] &= ~(1UL << (v & 63));
        }
    }

    static void ReadInput()
    {
        using var ms = new MemoryStream();
        using var si = Console.OpenStandardInput();
        si.CopyTo(ms);
        buf = ms.ToArray();
        bp = 0;
        N = RI(); M = RI();
        var al = new List<int>[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) al[i] = new List<int>();
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
        {
            int u = RI(), v = RI();
            al[u].Add(v); al[v].Add(u);
        }
        Adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++)
        {
            al[i].Sort();
            Adj[i] = al[i].ToArray();
        }
    }

    static int RI()
    {
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] <= (byte)' ') bp++;
        int r = 0;
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] >= (byte)'0' && buf[bp] <= (byte)'9')
            r = r * 10 + (buf[bp++] - '0');
        return r;
    }

    static void Degeneracy(int[] order, int[] pos)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int md = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) if (deg[i] > md) md = deg[i];

        int[] hd = new int[md + 2];
        int[] nx = new int[N], pv = new int[N];
        Array.Fill(hd, -1);
        for (int i = N - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            nx[i] = hd[deg[i]];
            pv[i] = -1;
            if (hd[deg[i]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[i]]] = i;
            hd[deg[i]] = i;
        }

        bool[] rm = new bool[N];
        int cur = 0;
        for (int it = 0; it < N; it++)
        {
            while (cur <= md && hd[cur] == -1) cur++;
            int v = hd[cur];
            hd[cur] = nx[v];
            if (nx[v] != -1) pv[nx[v]] = -1;
            rm[v] = true;
            order[it] = v;
            pos[v] = it;

            var av = Adj[v];
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
            {
                int u = av[k];
                if (rm[u]) continue;
                int od = deg[u];
                if (pv[u] == -1)
                {
                    hd[od] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = -1;
                }
                else
                {
                    nx[pv[u]] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = pv[u];
                }
                deg[u]--;
                nx[u] = hd[deg[u]];
                pv[u] = -1;
                if (hd[deg[u]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[u]]] = u;
                hd[deg[u]] = u;
                if (deg[u] < cur) cur = deg[u];
            }
        }
    }

    static int[] Greedy(int[] dOrder)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int[] byDeg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) byDeg[i] = i;
        Array.Sort(byDeg, (a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));

        int[] best = { byDeg[0] };
        var starts = new HashSet<int>();
        int tries = Math.Min(N, 100);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries; t++) starts.Add(byDeg[t]);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries && N - 1 - t >= 0; t++) starts.Add(dOrder[N - 1 - t]);

        foreach (int start in starts)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > 5000) break;
            var clique = new List<int> { start };
            var cands = new List<int>(Adj[start]);
            cands.Sort((a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));
            foreach (int v in cands)
            {
                bool ok = true;
                foreach (int u in clique)
                    if (Array.BinarySearch(Adj[v], u) < 0) { ok = false; break; }
                if (ok) clique.Add(v);
            }
            if (clique.Count > best.Length) best = clique.ToArray();
        }
        return best;
    }
}

View C# Code (9213 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

class Program
{
    static int N, M;
    static int[][] Adj;
    static Stopwatch SW;
    static volatile int GBest;
    static int[] GBestClique;
    static readonly object Lk = new object();
    static volatile bool Stop;
    const long TL = 270_000;
    static byte[] buf;
    static int bp;

    static void Main()
    {
        SW = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        ReadInput();
        if (N == 0) { Console.Write("0\n\n"); return; }
        if (M == 0) { Console.Write("1\n0\n"); return; }

        int[] order = new int[N], pos = new int[N];
        Degeneracy(order, pos);

        GBestClique = Greedy(order);
        GBest = GBestClique.Length;

        int cores = Math.Max(1, Environment.ProcessorCount);
        Parallel.For(0, N, new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = cores }, (rawIdx) =>
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int i = N - 1 - rawIdx;
            if (i < 0) return;
            int v = order[i];

            var av = Adj[v];
            int rc = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rc++;
            if (rc + 1 <= GBest) return;

            int[] rn = new int[rc];
            int ri = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rn[ri++] = av[k];

            int sn = rn.Length;
            var vm = new Dictionary<int, int>(sn * 2);
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) vm[rn[j]] = j;

            int words = (sn + 63) >> 6;
            var la = new ulong[sn][];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) la[j] = new ulong[words];

            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++)
            {
                int u = rn[j];
                var au = Adj[u];
                for (int k = 0; k < au.Length; k++)
                {
                    if (vm.TryGetValue(au[k], out int wi) && wi > j)
                    {
                        la[j][wi >> 6] |= 1UL << (wi & 63);
                        la[wi][j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);
                    }
                }
            }

            ulong[] P = new ulong[words];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) P[j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);

            int[] cl = new int[sn];
            int[] lb = null;
            int lbl = GBest - 1;
            int nc = 0;

            Search(la, P, sn, cl, 0, ref lb, ref lbl, words, ref nc);

            if (lb != null)
            {
                var full = new int[lb.Length + 1];
                full[0] = v;
                for (int j = 0; j < lb.Length; j++) full[j + 1] = rn[lb[j]];
                lock (Lk)
                {
                    if (full.Length > GBest)
                    {
                        GBestClique = full;
                        GBest = full.Length;
                    }
                }
            }
        });

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.Append(GBest).Append('\n');
        for (int i = 0; i < GBestClique.Length; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) sb.Append(' ');
            sb.Append(GBestClique[i]);
        }
        sb.Append('\n');
        Console.Write(sb.ToString());
    }

    static void Search(ulong[][] la, ulong[] P, int pl, int[] cl, int cLen,
        ref int[] best, ref int bl, int w, ref int nc)
    {
        if (Stop) return;
        if (++nc % 8192 == 0)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > TL) { Stop = true; return; }
            int gb = GBest;
            if (gb - 1 > bl) bl = gb - 1;
        }

        if (cLen + pl <= bl) return;

        if (pl == 0)
        {
            if (cLen > bl)
            {
                bl = cLen;
                best = new int[cLen];
                Array.Copy(cl, best, cLen);
            }
            return;
        }

        int[] vs = new int[pl];
        int vi = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < w && vi < pl; i++)
        {
            ulong b = P[i];
            while (b != 0)
            {
                int bit = BitOperations.TrailingZeroCount(b);
                vs[vi++] = (i << 6) | bit;
                b &= b - 1;
            }
        }

        int[] col = new int[pl];
        int mc = 0;
        int[] used = new int[pl + 2];
        int marker = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < pl; i++)
        {
            marker++;
            int v = vs[i];
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++)
            {
                int u = vs[j];
                if ((la[v][u >> 6] & (1UL << (u & 63))) != 0)
                    used[col[j]] = marker;
            }
            int c = 1;
            while (used[c] == marker) c++;
            col[i] = c;
            if (c > mc) mc = c;
        }

        if (cLen + mc <= bl) return;

        Array.Sort(col, vs, 0, pl);

        ulong[] cp = new ulong[w];
        Array.Copy(P, cp, w);

        for (int ii = pl - 1; ii >= 0; ii--)
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int v = vs[ii];
            int c = col[ii];
            if (cLen + c <= bl) return;

            ulong[] np = new ulong[w];
            int npl = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < w; i++)
            {
                np[i] = cp[i] & la[v][i];
                npl += BitOperations.PopCount(np[i]);
            }

            cl[cLen] = v;
            Search(la, np, npl, cl, cLen + 1, ref best, ref bl, w, ref nc);

            cp[v >> 6] &= ~(1UL << (v & 63));
        }
    }

    static void ReadInput()
    {
        using var ms = new MemoryStream();
        using var si = Console.OpenStandardInput();
        si.CopyTo(ms);
        buf = ms.ToArray();
        bp = 0;
        N = RI(); M = RI();
        var al = new List<int>[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) al[i] = new List<int>();
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
        {
            int u = RI(), v = RI();
            al[u].Add(v); al[v].Add(u);
        }
        Adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++)
        {
            al[i].Sort();
            Adj[i] = al[i].ToArray();
        }
    }

    static int RI()
    {
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] <= (byte)' ') bp++;
        int r = 0;
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] >= (byte)'0' && buf[bp] <= (byte)'9')
            r = r * 10 + (buf[bp++] - '0');
        return r;
    }

    static void Degeneracy(int[] order, int[] pos)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int md = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) if (deg[i] > md) md = deg[i];

        int[] hd = new int[md + 2];
        int[] nx = new int[N], pv = new int[N];
        Array.Fill(hd, -1);
        for (int i = N - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            nx[i] = hd[deg[i]];
            pv[i] = -1;
            if (hd[deg[i]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[i]]] = i;
            hd[deg[i]] = i;
        }

        bool[] rm = new bool[N];
        int cur = 0;
        for (int it = 0; it < N; it++)
        {
            while (cur <= md && hd[cur] == -1) cur++;
            int v = hd[cur];
            hd[cur] = nx[v];
            if (nx[v] != -1) pv[nx[v]] = -1;
            rm[v] = true;
            order[it] = v;
            pos[v] = it;

            var av = Adj[v];
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
            {
                int u = av[k];
                if (rm[u]) continue;
                int od = deg[u];
                if (pv[u] == -1)
                {
                    hd[od] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = -1;
                }
                else
                {
                    nx[pv[u]] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = pv[u];
                }
                deg[u]--;
                nx[u] = hd[deg[u]];
                pv[u] = -1;
                if (hd[deg[u]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[u]]] = u;
                hd[deg[u]] = u;
                if (deg[u] < cur) cur = deg[u];
            }
        }
    }

    static int[] Greedy(int[] dOrder)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int[] byDeg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) byDeg[i] = i;
        Array.Sort(byDeg, (a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));

        int[] best = { byDeg[0] };
        var starts = new HashSet<int>();
        int tries = Math.Min(N, 100);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries; t++) starts.Add(byDeg[t]);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries && N - 1 - t >= 0; t++) starts.Add(dOrder[N - 1 - t]);

        foreach (int start in starts)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > 5000) break;
            var clique = new List<int> { start };
            var cands = new List<int>(Adj[start]);
            cands.Sort((a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));
            foreach (int v in cands)
            {
                bool ok = true;
                foreach (int u in clique)
                    if (Array.BinarySearch(Adj[v], u) < 0) { ok = false; break; }
                if (ok) clique.Add(v);
            }
            if (clique.Count > best.Length) best = clique.ToArray();
        }
        return best;
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Numerics;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

class Program
{
    static int N, M;
    static int[][] Adj;
    static Stopwatch SW;
    static volatile int GBest;
    static int[] GBestClique;
    static readonly object Lk = new object();
    static volatile bool Stop;
    const long TL = 270_000;
    static byte[] buf;
    static int bp;

    static void Main()
    {
        SW = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        ReadInput();
        if (N == 0) { Console.Write("0\n\n"); return; }
        if (M == 0) { Console.Write("1\n0\n"); return; }

        int[] order = new int[N], pos = new int[N];
        Degeneracy(order, pos);

        GBestClique = Greedy(order);
        GBest = GBestClique.Length;

        int cores = Math.Max(1, Environment.ProcessorCount);
        Parallel.For(0, N, new ParallelOptions { MaxDegreeOfParallelism = cores }, (rawIdx) =>
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int i = N - 1 - rawIdx;
            if (i < 0) return;
            int v = order[i];

            var av = Adj[v];
            int rc = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rc++;
            if (rc + 1 <= GBest) return;

            int[] rn = new int[rc];
            int ri = 0;
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
                if (pos[av[k]] > i) rn[ri++] = av[k];

            int sn = rn.Length;
            var vm = new Dictionary<int, int>(sn * 2);
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) vm[rn[j]] = j;

            int words = (sn + 63) >> 6;
            var la = new ulong[sn][];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) la[j] = new ulong[words];

            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++)
            {
                int u = rn[j];
                var au = Adj[u];
                for (int k = 0; k < au.Length; k++)
                {
                    if (vm.TryGetValue(au[k], out int wi) && wi > j)
                    {
                        la[j][wi >> 6] |= 1UL << (wi & 63);
                        la[wi][j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);
                    }
                }
            }

            ulong[] P = new ulong[words];
            for (int j = 0; j < sn; j++) P[j >> 6] |= 1UL << (j & 63);

            int[] cl = new int[sn];
            int[] lb = null;
            int lbl = GBest - 1;
            int nc = 0;

            Search(la, P, sn, cl, 0, ref lb, ref lbl, words, ref nc);

            if (lb != null)
            {
                var full = new int[lb.Length + 1];
                full[0] = v;
                for (int j = 0; j < lb.Length; j++) full[j + 1] = rn[lb[j]];
                lock (Lk)
                {
                    if (full.Length > GBest)
                    {
                        GBestClique = full;
                        GBest = full.Length;
                    }
                }
            }
        });

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.Append(GBest).Append('\n');
        for (int i = 0; i < GBestClique.Length; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) sb.Append(' ');
            sb.Append(GBestClique[i]);
        }
        sb.Append('\n');
        Console.Write(sb.ToString());
    }

    static void Search(ulong[][] la, ulong[] P, int pl, int[] cl, int cLen,
        ref int[] best, ref int bl, int w, ref int nc)
    {
        if (Stop) return;
        if (++nc % 8192 == 0)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > TL) { Stop = true; return; }
            int gb = GBest;
            if (gb - 1 > bl) bl = gb - 1;
        }

        if (cLen + pl <= bl) return;

        if (pl == 0)
        {
            if (cLen > bl)
            {
                bl = cLen;
                best = new int[cLen];
                Array.Copy(cl, best, cLen);
            }
            return;
        }

        int[] vs = new int[pl];
        int vi = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < w && vi < pl; i++)
        {
            ulong b = P[i];
            while (b != 0)
            {
                int bit = BitOperations.TrailingZeroCount(b);
                vs[vi++] = (i << 6) | bit;
                b &= b - 1;
            }
        }

        int[] col = new int[pl];
        int mc = 0;
        int[] used = new int[pl + 2];
        int marker = 0;

        for (int i = 0; i < pl; i++)
        {
            marker++;
            int v = vs[i];
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++)
            {
                int u = vs[j];
                if ((la[v][u >> 6] & (1UL << (u & 63))) != 0)
                    used[col[j]] = marker;
            }
            int c = 1;
            while (used[c] == marker) c++;
            col[i] = c;
            if (c > mc) mc = c;
        }

        if (cLen + mc <= bl) return;

        Array.Sort(col, vs, 0, pl);

        ulong[] cp = new ulong[w];
        Array.Copy(P, cp, w);

        for (int ii = pl - 1; ii >= 0; ii--)
        {
            if (Stop) return;
            int v = vs[ii];
            int c = col[ii];
            if (cLen + c <= bl) return;

            ulong[] np = new ulong[w];
            int npl = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < w; i++)
            {
                np[i] = cp[i] & la[v][i];
                npl += BitOperations.PopCount(np[i]);
            }

            cl[cLen] = v;
            Search(la, np, npl, cl, cLen + 1, ref best, ref bl, w, ref nc);

            cp[v >> 6] &= ~(1UL << (v & 63));
        }
    }

    static void ReadInput()
    {
        using var ms = new MemoryStream();
        using var si = Console.OpenStandardInput();
        si.CopyTo(ms);
        buf = ms.ToArray();
        bp = 0;
        N = RI(); M = RI();
        var al = new List<int>[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) al[i] = new List<int>();
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++)
        {
            int u = RI(), v = RI();
            al[u].Add(v); al[v].Add(u);
        }
        Adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++)
        {
            al[i].Sort();
            Adj[i] = al[i].ToArray();
        }
    }

    static int RI()
    {
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] <= (byte)' ') bp++;
        int r = 0;
        while (bp < buf.Length && buf[bp] >= (byte)'0' && buf[bp] <= (byte)'9')
            r = r * 10 + (buf[bp++] - '0');
        return r;
    }

    static void Degeneracy(int[] order, int[] pos)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int md = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) if (deg[i] > md) md = deg[i];

        int[] hd = new int[md + 2];
        int[] nx = new int[N], pv = new int[N];
        Array.Fill(hd, -1);
        for (int i = N - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            nx[i] = hd[deg[i]];
            pv[i] = -1;
            if (hd[deg[i]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[i]]] = i;
            hd[deg[i]] = i;
        }

        bool[] rm = new bool[N];
        int cur = 0;
        for (int it = 0; it < N; it++)
        {
            while (cur <= md && hd[cur] == -1) cur++;
            int v = hd[cur];
            hd[cur] = nx[v];
            if (nx[v] != -1) pv[nx[v]] = -1;
            rm[v] = true;
            order[it] = v;
            pos[v] = it;

            var av = Adj[v];
            for (int k = 0; k < av.Length; k++)
            {
                int u = av[k];
                if (rm[u]) continue;
                int od = deg[u];
                if (pv[u] == -1)
                {
                    hd[od] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = -1;
                }
                else
                {
                    nx[pv[u]] = nx[u];
                    if (nx[u] != -1) pv[nx[u]] = pv[u];
                }
                deg[u]--;
                nx[u] = hd[deg[u]];
                pv[u] = -1;
                if (hd[deg[u]] != -1) pv[hd[deg[u]]] = u;
                hd[deg[u]] = u;
                if (deg[u] < cur) cur = deg[u];
            }
        }
    }

    static int[] Greedy(int[] dOrder)
    {
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) deg[i] = Adj[i].Length;
        int[] byDeg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) byDeg[i] = i;
        Array.Sort(byDeg, (a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));

        int[] best = { byDeg[0] };
        var starts = new HashSet<int>();
        int tries = Math.Min(N, 100);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries; t++) starts.Add(byDeg[t]);
        for (int t = 0; t < tries && N - 1 - t >= 0; t++) starts.Add(dOrder[N - 1 - t]);

        foreach (int start in starts)
        {
            if (SW.ElapsedMilliseconds > 5000) break;
            var clique = new List<int> { start };
            var cands = new List<int>(Adj[start]);
            cands.Sort((a, b) => deg[b].CompareTo(deg[a]));
            foreach (int v in cands)
            {
                bool ok = true;
                foreach (int u in clique)
                    if (Array.BinarySearch(Adj[v], u) < 0) { ok = false; break; }
                if (ok) clique.Add(v);
            }
            if (clique.Count > best.Length) best = clique.ToArray();
        }
        return best;
    }
}
